task_name: Personalized 30-Day Data Analysis Interview Study Plan Generator
description: This task requires designing a personalized 30-day study plan for a data analysis job interview for an intermediate Python learner. The plan should comprehensively consider the user's current skill level, target job requirements, daily available study time, and learning style preferences (video/hands-on/reading), generating a structured daily learning task schedule that includes learning topics, recommended resource links, and practice exercises. Optional output of an .ics calendar file for importing into calendar applications for reminders. This task tests educational technology application, personalized recommendation system design, and understanding of data analysis skill systems, making it suitable for smart education product prototyping, career planning coaching tools, or online learning platform feature development.
skills_required: Understanding of data analysis skill systems (SQL, Python, statistics, visualization, etc.)
Instructional design and curriculum planning ability

subtask1.query: Please read the query.md file in the workspace directory for detailed task requirements. The context directory provides reference examples (if any). You need to design a 30-day data analysis job interview study plan for an intermediate Python learner (who has mastered basic Python syntax and basic data structures). The plan should cover SQL data querying, Python data processing (Pandas/NumPy), data visualization (Matplotlib/Seaborn), statistics fundamentals, and machine learning introduction as core skills, with reasonable difficulty progression. Each day should include learning topics, recommended resources (video/article/book links), and practice tasks or exercises. It is recommended to organize by week, with a theme objective set for each week and 2-3 hours of learning content arranged daily. Optionally generate an .ics calendar file for importing into Google Calendar or Outlook for reminder setup. Upon completion, save the study plan in Markdown format in the current directory, and the calendar file (if any) also in the current directory.
deliverables: Plan structure: Organized by week/day, 30 days total; each week includes theme objective summary; each day includes 'Learning Topic', 'Resources' (video/article/book links), 'Practice Task' (exercises or projects), 'Estimated Time' modules

Content requirements: Cover SQL, Python (Pandas/NumPy), data visualization, statistics, and machine learning introduction as core skills; reasonable difficulty progression from basics to advanced; recommend real, usable learning resources (such as Coursera courses, Kaggle tutorials, classic books); include at least 1-2 comprehensive practice projects
.ics calendar file (*.ics) - Optional, suggested filename: 'study_plan_calendar.ics', importable into Google Calendar/Outlook, with daily study reminder events

evaluation_criteria.skill_coverage: Comprehensiveness and relevance of skill coverage (SQL, Python, statistics, visualization, etc.) (30 pts)
evaluation_criteria.progression_design: Reasonableness of difficulty progression, natural transition from basics to advanced (25 pts)
evaluation_criteria.resource_quality: Authenticity, availability, and quality of recommended learning resources (20 pts)
evaluation_criteria.practicality: Reasonable practice task design, feasible daily time arrangement, strong plan executability (15 pts)
evaluation_criteria.documentation_format: Clear Markdown document structure, good readability; correct calendar file format (if any) (10 pts)
